description: see http://hl7.org/fhir/json.html#schema for information about the FHIR Json Schemas

RiskAssessment.description: An assessment of the likely outcome(s) for a patient or other subject as well as the likelihood of each outcome.

id.description: The logical id of the resource, as used in the URL for the resource. Once assigned, this value never changes.

status.description: The status of the RiskAssessment, using the same statuses as an Observation.

method.description: The algorithm, process or mechanism used to evaluate the risk.

code.description: The type of the risk assessment performed.

subject.description: The patient or group the risk assessment applies to.

encounter.description: The encounter where the assessment was performed.

occurrenceDateTime.description: The date (and possibly time) the risk assessment was performed.

condition.description: For assessments or prognosis specific to a particular condition, indicates the condition being assessed.

performer.description: The provider or software application that performed the assessment.

reasonCode.description: The reason the risk assessment was performed.

reasonReference.description: Resources supporting the reason the risk assessment was performed.

basis.description: Indicates the source data considered as part of the assessment.

prediction.description: Describes the expected outcome for the subject.

mitigation.description: A description of the steps that might be taken to reduce the identified risk(s).

note.description: Additional comments about the risk assessment.

identifier.description: Business identifier assigned to the risk assessment.

basedOn.description: A reference to the request that is fulfilled by this risk assessment.

parent.description: A reference to a resource that this risk assessment is part of, such as a Procedure.

RiskAssessment_Prediction.description: An assessment of the likely outcome(s) for a patient or other subject as well as the likelihood of each outcome.

id.description: Unique id for the element within a resource.

outcome.description: One of the potential outcomes for the patient (e.g. remission, death, a particular condition).

probabilityDecimal.description: Indicates how likely the outcome is (in the specified timeframe).

probabilityRange.description: Indicates how likely the outcome is (in the specified timeframe).

qualitativeRisk.description: Indicates how likely the outcome is, expressed as a qualitative value (e.g. low, medium, or high).

relativeRisk.description: Indicates the risk for this particular subject divided by the risk of the population in general.

whenPeriod.description: Indicates the period of time or age range of the subject to which the specified probability applies.

whenRange.description: Indicates the period of time or age range of the subject to which the specified probability applies.

rationale.description: Additional information explaining the basis for the prediction.
